STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-EUDIE_MAIDEN_REBOR: At end of turn, if your hand has fewer than 5 cards, draw 1 additional card next turn. If your hand has more than 6 cards, gain 1 Energy next turn.
At end of turn, if your hand has fewer than 5 cards, draw {Amount} additional card next turn. If your hand has more than 6 cards, gain {Amount} Energy next turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-ANCIENT_CANNON_POW: Whenever you merge an Artifact, deal damage to a random enemy.
Whenever you merge an Artifact, deal {Amount} damage to a random enemy.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-REPLAY_NEXT_PUPPET: The next Puppet you play is replayed.
The next Puppet you play is replayed {Amount} time(s).
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-PUPPET_THEATER_POW: At the start of each turn, add Puppet(s) to your hand.
At the start of each turn, add {Amount} Puppet(s) to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-LIAM_CRAZED_CREATO: Whenever you play a Puppet, gain Block. For every 4 Puppets played, gain 1 Energy.
Whenever you play a Puppet, gain {Amount} Block. For every 4 Puppets played, gain 1 Energy.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-AXIA_HEIR_TO_DESTR: At end of turn, Exhaust all [gold]White Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] and [gold]Black Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] in your hand.
At end of turn, Exhaust all [gold]White Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] and [gold]Black Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] in your hand {Amount} time(s).
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-BEELZEBUB_SUPREME_: Whenever an enemy takes damage, it takes extra damage. Whenever you gain Block, you gain extra Block.
Whenever an enemy takes damage, it takes +{Amount} damage. Whenever you gain Block, you gain +{Amount} Block.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-MECHANIZED_BEAST_P: When attacked, deal damage back. Expires next turn.
When attacked, deal {Amount} damage back. Expires next turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-IMARI_DEWDROP_POWE: This turn, whenever you play a Skill, add Imari's Little Buddies to your hand.
This turn, whenever you play a Skill, add Imari's Little Buddies to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SLAUS_REVOLVING_WH: Crest: Slaus, Revolving Wheel of Fortune
At start of turn, activate a random ability: reduce all hand costs by 1, gain Strength and Dexterity, or heal. Cannot repeat the previous turn's effect.
At start of turn, activate a random ability: reduce all hand costs by 1 until end of turn, gain 2 Strength and 2 Dexterity until end of turn, or heal 3 HP. Cannot repeat the previous turn's effect.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-FLOWERING_ARTISAN_: This turn, whenever you play a Skill, deal damage to ALL enemies.
This turn, whenever you play a Skill, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-LU_WOH_INTENT_DEBU: For the next 3 enemy turns, enemies that intend to attack lose 4 Strength for that turn.
For the next {Amount} enemy turn(s), enemies that intend to attack lose 4 [gold]Strength[/gold] for that turn.
